Message: Account number must not be empty
Account number must be exactly 18 characters
Account number must start with 1 or 2 followed by digits
Balance should be positive
Balance must not exceed 999999999
Balance must be a valid number
Status must be A (Active) I (Inactive) or C (Closed)
Open date must be in CCYYMMDD format
Open date should not be in the future
First name must not be empty
First name should contain only letters and spaces
First name must be at least 2 characters
SSN must be 9 digits (no dashes)
SSN must not be all zeros
Active accounts should have a positive balance
Account number must be unique
Account + batch item must be unique
Bank number must match for same account
Batch items must be sequential per account
Transaction count must match actual records
Total payments per account must not exceed limit
